summary: Frontend-only testing of light-themed landing page redesign. All 28 UI tests passed (100%). Light section backgrounds properly applied (cream, soft green, soft blue, soft violet, soft amber). New freehand tilted M logo working. Login flow successful. Chat page loads without WaveformLogoSmall errors.
passed_tests: Navbar visible with data-testid='navbar'
Logo button (data-testid='logo-button') visible with freehand M design
Nav Get Started button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Nav links present: Features, How it works, Scenarios
Hero section (data-testid='hero-section') with LIGHT background rgb(250,250,250)
Hero heading 'Learn any language by speaking it' displayed
Hero '50+ languages' highlighted in emerald green
Hero AI Language Tutor badge displayed
Hero Start button (data-testid='hero-start-btn') navigates to /auth
Hero Dashboard button (data-testid='hero-dashboard-btn') visible
Hero greeting ticker shows animated greetings (Bonjour, Hola, Ciao, etc.)
Features section (data-testid='features-section') with LIGHT green background rgb(240,253,244)
Features section has 4 inline strips: Voice-First, Karaoke Tracking, Live AI Tools, Adaptive Curriculum
How it works section (data-testid='tools-section') with LIGHT blue background rgb(239,246,255)
How it works shows 4 timeline steps with STEP 01-04 labels
Timeline steps: Speak naturally, AI analyzes in real-time, Get spoken feedback, Level up automatically
Demo section (data-testid='demo-section') with LIGHT violet background rgb(250,245,255)
Demo section shows animated chat messages with freehand M logo
Demo Try it yourself button (data-testid='demo-try-btn') visible
Scenarios section (data-testid='scenarios-section') with LIGHT amber background rgb(255,251,235)
Scenarios section shows 5 floating pill tags: Job Interview, Travel, Restaurant, Small Talk, Business
CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') with LIGHT background rgb(248,250,252)
CTA heading 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' displayed
CTA Begin your first lesson button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') navigates to /auth
Footer (data-testid='footer') shows freehand M logo and 3 navigation buttons (Practice, Dashboard, Vocabulary)
Auth page loads with light theme background
Auth page shows freehand M logo (data-testid='auth-logo')
Login with demo@mumble.app/demo123 successful
Chat page loads after login without WaveformLogoSmall errors
Chat page displays freehand M logo in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Light theme successfully applied - all section backgrounds are light colors as user requested
New freehand tilted M logo (WaveformLogo) working correctly across landing, auth, and chat pages
WaveformLogoSmall alias properly added for backward compatibility - no import errors
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
Framer Motion animations working: word reveals, scroll progress, greeting ticker, parallax
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page 6th redesign with LIGHT THEME complete. All light backgrounds verified: hero=#fafafa (rgb 250,250,250), features=#f0fdf4 (rgb 240,253,244 soft green), tools=#eff6ff (rgb 239,246,255 soft blue), demo=#faf5ff (rgb 250,245,255 soft violet), scenarios=#fffbeb (rgb 255,251,235 soft amber), cta=#f8fafc (rgb 248,250,252), footer=#f1f5f9. New freehand tilted M logo working. WaveformLogoSmall alias added. Auth page has light theme. Login flow working. Chat page loads without errors. Demo: demo@mumble.app/demo123
